context: Tests whether the agent uses the custom Liquid Glass container and transition APIs correctly for grouped controls.

checklist.name: Single container
checklist.description: Uses one GlassEffectContainer for the related palette group instead of nested per-item containers.

checklist.name: Button styles
checklist.description: Uses SwiftUI glass button styles for actual icon controls rather than manually adding interactive glass to Buttons.

checklist.name: Morphing IDs
checklist.description: Uses glassEffectID with a Namespace for hierarchy changes and uses Sendable identifiers.

checklist.name: Transition choice
checklist.description: Mentions matched geometry for nearby palette morphing or materialize for distant insertion/removal.

checklist.name: Modifier and availability
checklist.description: Applies glass effects after layout/appearance modifiers and includes iOS 26 availability fallback guidance.
